title: bothriospermum tenellum
intro: Bothriospermum tenellum, a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, is a flowering plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It is also known as Small Bugloss or Tenellum, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Bothriospermum tenellum can be found in various forms, including infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to alleviate respiratory symptoms, promote relaxation, and improve overall well-being.
